channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jokic gets a triple-double in his return to lead Nuggets past Bucks 127-117
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Nikola Jokic had 39 points, 10 rebounds and 10 assists in his first game back in nearly two weeks to lead the Denver Nuggets to a 127-117 victory against the Milwaukee Bucks on Wednesday night. The triple-double was Jokic’s NBA-leading 30th of the season.
item.dc:creator: CRAIG MEYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: American figure skater Alysa Liu takes the lead on the opening night of the world championships
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Alysa Liu rarely wavers when it comes to anything, whether it be her abrupt decision to retire after the 2022 Winter Olympics, or the American figure skater's similarly stunning decision to announce her comeback early last year.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LeBron James beats buzzer with tip to lift Lakers past Pacers and keep record streak alive
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — LeBron James had a buzzer-beating tip-in to cap a 10-point fourth quarter, Luka Doncic scored 34 points and the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Indiana Pacers 120-119 on Wednesday night. James extended his NBA-record streak of 10 or more points to 1,283 games — barely.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: UConn's Dan Hurley expresses regret over postgame remarks that were caught on camera
item.description: UConn coach Dan Hurley acknowledged there are things that “I wish I didn’t do” as he expressed regret over making profane comments about the officiating after the Huskies’ NCAA Tournament loss to Florida.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: TCU's Hailey Van Lith glad to have shared publicly about mental health issues she dealt with in past
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — TCU standout guard Hailey Van Lith said that while difficult, she is glad to have shared publicly about mental health struggles she said she dealt with early in her basketball career. “It’s been very positive.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: In the era of big velocities, some pitchers are still finding other ways to succeed
item.description: SURPRISE, Ariz. (AP) — Texas Rangers left-hander Cody Bradford says he realized early on that he probably wouldn’t ever possess the type of fastball that causes scouts to take a second look at their radar guns.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Basketball legend fires back at 'big dummies' who ignored Caitlin Clark's immediate WNBA impact
item.description: Basketball legend Cheryl Miller hit out at critics who ignored the impact Caitlin Clark made during the 2024 WNBA season and talked about her race.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Xavier hires Richard Pitino as basketball coach
item.description: There will be more than one Pitino in the Big East next season. Xavier hired Richard Pitino, the son of St. John's coach Rick Pitino, as its basketball coach on Tuesday night. The school had an opening after Sean Miller left to accept the Texas job on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russell Wilson is heading to the New York Giants, AP source says
item.description: Russell Wilson has agreed on a one-year contract with the New York Giants, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bryan Hodgson named University of South Florida head men's basketball coach
item.description: Bryan Hodgson, one of the nation’s top recruiters and a rising head coach, has been named the University of South Florida head men’s basketball coach, Vice President for Athletics Michael Kelly announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF Athletics, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah's playoff hopes take big hit with 5-1 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The playoff hopes of the Utah Hockey Club are growing dimmer after a 5-1 loss to the Detroit Red Wings Monday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC dealt first loss in inaugural season
item.description: San Diego FC lost its first game of the season thus far on Sunday when the club fell 2-1 to Austin FC at Q2 Stadium in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Nine-man Monarchs come from behind twice to stun Rapids 2 in shootout victory
item.description: It was a rough start for the Monarchs on Sunday, but they still claimed a shootout victory against their Rocky Mountain rivals.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Koby Brea leads the way as Kentucky beats Illinois 84-75 for first Sweet 16 appearance since 2019
item.description: Koby Brea matched a career high with 23 points and Kentucky beat Illinois 84-75 on Sunday to advance beyond the NCAA Tournament’s opening weekend for the first time since they reached the Elite Eight in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU will have hands full with Wisconsin
item.description: DENVEER (ABC4 Sports) - If BYU is going to get to its first Sweet 16 since 2011, the Cougars are going to have to deal with one of the powers of the Big Ten Conference, #13 Wisconsin.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Major League Baseball removes references to 'diversity' from MLB Careers home page
item.description: Baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred, who launched a Diversity Pipeline Program in 2016, said following an owners meeting in Palm Beach, Florida, last month that MLB was evaluating the interpretation of law coming from the federal government.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Guenther scores go-ahead goal in 3-2 win over Buffalo
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club scored three goals in the third period and defeated the Buffalo Sabres 5-2 at Delta Center on Thursday. Mikhail Sergachev scored twice for Utah (31-27-11), which has won five of its last seven games at home.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Derrick Rose to throw out first pitch at White Sox Opening Day
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox announced several highlights planned for their regular season-opening series against the Los Angeles Angels, including Derrick Rose throwing out the ceremonial first pitch on Opening Day.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Top-ranked Chicago area softball player to represent Puerto Rico at U-15 Pan American Championship
item.description: ROSELLE, Ill. — In the backyard of her Roselle home, Maya Melendez practices her favorite sport on her personal field of dreams. “When you’re a kid playing (sports), it’s basketball in the street, so what kid wouldn’t want to have their own field in their yard?” Maya’s dad, Randy Smith, figured.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9
